name: @zenystx/helios-blitz
description: Helios Blitz — NATS-backed stream & batch processing engine

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist/src --target node --format esm --external @nats-io/jetstream --external @nats-io/kv --external @nats-io/transport-node --external @nestjs/common --external @nestjs/core --external @zenystx/helios-core && bun build ./src/nestjs/index.ts --outdir dist/src/nestjs --target node --format esm --external @nats-io/jetstream --external @nats-io/kv --external @nats-io/transport-node --external @nestjs/common --external @nestjs/core --external @zenystx/helios-core && bun run tsc --project tsconfig.build.json

author: Helios Contributors
